company.title: About the Company
company.industryDetail: Manufacturing and processing of zipper bags and household plastic products: floor mats, table mats, cutting boards, anti-slip nets, drawer mats, baseboards, storage boxes, and more.
company.timelineTaiwan: 1983 — Jhonsin Taiwan (the parent company) was founded, starting from material research and product development.
company.timelineStage1: Stage 1 (2023) — Evaluated expansion investment and selected the factory site at An Phuoc Industrial Park, An Phuoc Commune, Dong Nai.
company.timelineStage2: Stage 2 (October 2024) — Formalized the organization and built the GMP quality documentation system.
company.why1: Safe working environment, compliant with ISO, IWAY, C-TPAT
company.why2: Full social insurance and benefits as required by law
company.why4: Convenient location at An Phuoc Industrial Park, Dong Nai

products.title: Houseware Products
products.intro: Practical houseware ranges, from food storage to organizing everyday living spaces.

capabilities.title: Manufacturing Capabilities
capabilities.intro: Jhonsin Vietnam operates a quality management system aligned with ISO 9001:2015, backed by clear leadership commitment, quality policy and measurable objectives.
capabilities.commitmentText: Top management commits to building, maintaining and continually improving the quality management system per ISO 9001:2015 and supply chain security per CTPAT: full compliance, staff training, adequate resources, measurable quality objectives, supply chain risk prevention, and periodic management review.
capabilities.qmsText: Applies to the entire manufacturing and trading of household plastic products at the An Phuoc factory — covering customer requirements, design, production, quality inspection, delivery and after-sales care, operated on the PDCA cycle (Plan – Do – Check – Act).
capabilities.policyText: Willing employees – Successful business – Satisfied customers.
capabilities.objectivesIntro: Four measurable targets, tracked periodically for continual improvement:
capabilities.sourceNote: Content summarized from the Management Commitment, Quality Manual (ISO 9001:2015) and Quality Objectives of Jhonsin Vietnam Co., Ltd.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Connect with Jhonsin Vietnam to learn more about partnership and career opportunities.
